Security.rationale: Strong: bandit, pip-audit, SBOM, cosign, non-root, secrets via env. Minor: docker-compose dev creds.
key_risks: Docker Compose dev credentials in docker-compose.yml

Reliability.rationale: Health probes, K8s deployment. Missing: multi-replica, HPA.
recommended_actions: Consider HPA when scaling requirements known

Cost_Optimization.rationale: Reasonable defaults. No cost tags in K8s.
recommended_actions: Add cost allocation tags to K8s manifests

Operational_Excellence.rationale: Prometheus, structured logging, manual promote gate.

Observability.rationale: Metrics, health, Grafana dashboard, Prometheus config.

findings.title: Docker Compose dev credentials
findings.recommendation: Document as dev-only; prod uses SecretKeyRef

top_remediation_priorities: Add cost allocation tags to Kubernetes manifests
